sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, string_data FixedString(10));
SELECT id, string_data, toStringCutToZero(string_data) AS truncated_string FROM test_strings;
UPDATE test_strings SET string_data = toFixedString('newdata\0test', 10) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, toStringCutToZero(string_data) AS cut_string FROM test_strings WHERE id < 2;
